title: SSA Step (Execution Atom)
description: Structure for an executable Step used by Play/Remote/Overlay. Minimal contract focused on orchestration & concurrency. Compatible with the Session schema’s steps[].

id.description: Stable step identifier, unique within a session.

deps.description: IDs of prerequisite steps that must complete before this step starts.

device.description: Preferred device identifier (logical or physical) to execute this step (e.g., phone.rhonda, oven.main).

role.description: Preferred human/household role (e.g., cook, cleaner, gardener, butcher).

omp.description: O/M/P criticality flag — O=Optional (can be skipped), M=Mandatory (must run), P=Preferred (soft requirement; may degrade).

riskTag.description: Primary risk category tag (e.g., heat, sharp, bio, allergen, heavy, electrical, ladder, chemical, animal).

canParallelize.description: If true, this step is eligible to run in parallel with other steps (subject to runtime policy).

parallelKey.description: Concurrency grouping key. Steps with the same key may run together up to the group policy limits.

label.description: Short human-friendly label for UI surfaces.

meta.description: Forward-compatible bucket for domain-specific hints (kept permissive).
